hook.summary: Rapid-fire block placement and row clearing with glowing effects.
hook.visual_action: Wooden blocks are placed into a grid, completing rows that glow and vanish in quick succession.

scene_flow: Fast-paced gameplay showing wooden blocks being slotted into a grid to clear rows.
Multiple rows are cleared in quick succession, triggering positive feedback text like 'Great!' and 'Brilliant!'.
Text overlays emphasize the game's benefits: boredom-killing and free-to-play.
The video concludes with a menu showing various puzzle skins and a 'Play' button.
on_screen_text: This game is perfect for killing boredom
Easy to solve but hard to get high score
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle gamers looking for a satisfying and free way to pass the time.
